title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Unisys India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Unisys India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Unisys India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Unisys India:
Unisys India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unisys India!
